auth.subtitle: Use Forma on your phone without a PC, or connect sync with Forma on your computer.
auth.continueLocalHint: Data stays on this device. You can connect cloud later in settings.
auth.yandexMissingConfig: Configure the Yandex app ID in the build settings to sign in.
auth.hcTestHint: Diagnostics only. Not for everyday use.

onboarding.savedOnDevice: Saved on device. PC sync skipped.

backup.fullExportDesc: Export and import all profile data. Separate from cloud sync.
backup.importDesc: Merge adds to current data; replace clears affected sections then imports the file.
backup.replaceConfirmMessage: Current data in affected sections will be removed before import. Continue?
backup.formatHint: The forma_backup_v1.json file includes workouts, nutrition, body metrics, and settings. To transfer: export on the old profile → sign in on the new one → import (merge).

dbImport.title: Database file import (.db)
dbImport.desc: Import large workouts.db and shared.db without browser upload.
dbImport.hint: Choose a ZIP containing both files, or pick workouts.db and shared.db separately. Import runs in the background; the current database is backed up before replace.
dbImport.desktopOnly: Available only in the Forma desktop app
dbImport.replaceConfirmMessage: Current workouts.db and shared.db will be replaced after a backup. Continue?
dbImport.retryHint: Pick the files again to retry the import.
dbImport.verifyFailed: Import rolled back: the database did not pass health checks.
dbImport.visibilityTitle: Workouts in DB vs Workouts screen
dbImport.visibilityRows: Rows: {rows}, sessions (3 mo, as on screen): {ui}, all time: {all}
dbImport.visibilityWarning: Workouts exist in the database but the Workouts screen may be empty due to filters.

emergencyBackup.fullExportDesc: ZIP with workouts.db and shared.db for the current profile
emergencyBackup.fullExportHint: Compatible with «ZIP (workouts + shared)» import above. JSON export under «Export and restore» is a different format (data transfer without .db files).

warmup.sectionDesc: Optimizes a large database after import: indexes, analytics, and section caches.
warmup.promptMessage: We recommend warming up data so the app runs faster. A basic warmup has already started automatically.
warmup.retryHint: Warmup stopped — you can resume from the checkpoint.
warmup.verifyFailed: Warmup failed: the database did not pass health checks.

job.failedDefault: The job finished with an error

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Profile, sync, nutrition, and interface in one place.

sync.title: Sync
sync.cloudSubtitle: Backups and packages via Yandex Disk
sync.formaSyncHint: Incremental packages on disk. Does not replace full export in Data settings.
sync.settingsHint: Cloud sync status is on the Sync tab. OAuth, Polar, and backups are here.
sync.emergencyDbBackup: Emergency database copy (.db) — separate from cloud packages
sync.signInYandexHint: Sign in with Yandex on the login screen

recovery.title: Starting Forma
recovery.defaultReason: Startup took too long. You can continue locally without PC or cloud.

errors.apiNotConfigured: Server address is not set. Add it in connection settings.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
